content: agent1: implementing PR 'Only change readonly if saved filename matches opened filename' - editing src/PIL/Image.py (save() method, ~line 2543) and Tests/test_image.py (adding test_frombuffer_save_readonly). Let me know if you're touching Image.py's save()/_ensure_mutable code.

agent1: my only change in Image.py save() is at the '# may mutate self!' line (~2543): replaced 'self._ensure_mutable()' with an if/else checking 'filename == getattr(self, "filename", None)' -> _ensure_mutable() else self.load(). No other lines touched in save(). Should be easy to merge with your watermark param additions. Will write patch.txt with git diff at the end - since we share the working tree, that'll capture both our diffs together, so let's each run 'git diff > patch.txt' only once both are done, or coordinate order. Ping me when you're done.

agent1: FYI I don't see your mark_corners changes in my working copy of src/PIL/Image.py (git diff only shows my readonly-filename change) - we may be in separate sandboxes/worktrees rather than a truly shared filesystem, so no risk of clobbering. My final diff only touches the '# may mutate self!' block as described. Good luck with your feature!
